body.title: The dev-process pipeline — CC decomposed into specialist devices (intent → architecture → dispatch → build → prove)
body.summary: UnseenUniversity's north star is to remove the development process from being LLM-only, ONE PIECE AT A TIME. The whole pipeline is 'CC, spread out among specialist devices.' Flow: (1) a human (anybody) chats to VETINARI about intentions; (2) Vetinari extracts/codifies that into an intent artifact HUBERT can consume (the compilation seam); (3) Hubert wraps it in good architecture and outputs TICKETS; (4) GRANNY dispatches tickets by handshake to available BUILDER(S) — DickSimnel / Haiku / CC; (5) builders build AND prove; (6) the VERIFIER (evaluator device + proof_store) checks independently — the prover is NOT the builder; (7) the CRITIC runs adversarial check inside the build cycle. The design target: tickets easy and well-designed enough that even Haiku can build and prove them. CRITICAL FRAMING (corrected 2026-06-30): the foreground (CC) is meant to be CYCLIC + disposable with DURABLE STATE, and its only product is intent→provable-tickets — NOT building. The bottleneck has never been worker-lifecycle; it is TICKET QUALITY + PROCESS STRICTNESS (and CC's own habit of doing ungated foreground work, which leaves the debris that then needs a cleanup step).

key_concepts.name: Vetinari — intent extractor
key_concepts.what: devices/vetinari/ (device.py, shim.py, decompose_prompt.txt). Human chats; Vetinari codifies intent into something Hubert consumes. Has a clarification loop. The Intent Doc is the compilation seam.

key_concepts.name: Hubert — architecture specialist
key_concepts.what: devices/hubert/ (device.py, tools.py, constraint_normalizer.py, repo_auditor.py). Consumes intent, wraps in good architecture, emits tickets. Owner of dev-process artifacts (SPEC.md).

key_concepts.name: Granny — dispatch by handshake
key_concepts.what: devices/granny/ (daemon.py, availability.py, cc_worker_listener.py). Routes tickets to available builders over the bus; never spawns/claims (send-keys handshake).

key_concepts.name: Builders — build AND prove
key_concepts.what: DickSimnel (devices/dicksimnel/), Haiku, CC. DS/Ollama run on the M1 Studio 32GB (~2026-07-02). Target: tickets so well-specified even Haiku builds+proves them.

key_concepts.name: Verifier — separate from builder
key_concepts.what: devices/evaluator/ (core.py, loop.py) + unseen_university/proof_store.py. Independent proof-on-close (CP1); the prover is not the builder. Already exists.

key_concepts.name: Critic — adversarial, in-cycle
key_concepts.what: devices/critic/ (device.py, agent.py). Helps inside the build cycle. Distinct from the post-hoc verifier.

key_concepts.name: Meta-goal
key_concepts.what: Remove the dev process from being LLM-only, one piece at a time. Each device is a piece of CC's cognition lifted out of the LLM into a specialized, replaceable component. This IS the factory-of-factories / compiled-inference vision.

body.status_notes: All six pieces exist as devices as of 2026-06-30 (vetinari, hubert, granny, dicksimnel, evaluator, critic). Pipeline is BUILT but was unmapped — this intention-point is the connective map requested by Akien 2026-06-30. Open: the foreground-discipline (CC stops doing ungated build work) and ticket-provability gate are the live levers, not new devices.
